seo.title: Two Pharmacy — Pharmacy, Reimagined.
seo.description: A modern neighbourhood pharmacy. Authentic medicines, careful counsel, and a calmer way to take care of yourself.

hero.headline: Pharmacy, reimagined.
hero.tagline: Authentic medicines, careful counsel, and a quieter, more considered way to take care of yourself — and the people you love.

about.description: Two Pharmacy is the neighbourhood pharmacy we always wanted to walk into — calm, honest, and built around the person standing at the counter. We carry a tightly curated catalogue of authentic medicines and wellness essentials, and our pharmacists make time for real conversations, not just transactions.

services.title: Prescription Dispensing
services.description: Bring in or upload a prescription and our pharmacists will fulfil it accurately, with batch verification on every order.

services.title: Pharmacist Consultations
services.description: Five focused minutes with a licensed pharmacist — questions about dosage, interactions, alternatives, or simply a clear next step.

services.title: Wellness Essentials
services.description: A small, considered selection of vitamins, immunity, sleep and recovery products — only brands we'd take ourselves.

services.title: Diagnostic Pickup
services.description: Drop off a prescription for blood work or a basic test — we coordinate with our partner labs and notify you when reports arrive.

data.heading: Made for the way pharmacies should feel

images.alt: Apothecary bottles arranged on a shelf
images.caption: Curated catalogue

items.title: Only authentic medicines
items.description: Every batch is sourced from licensed distributors and validated on arrival — no grey-market product on our shelves.

items.title: Pharmacists who have time
items.description: We staff for conversation, not throughput. You'll get a real answer to your question before you leave.

items.title: Quiet, considered space
items.description: Calm lighting, low noise, no upsells. A pharmacy should feel like a deep breath, not an aisle of bright packaging.

items.title: Free delivery, fairly priced
items.description: Free same-day delivery within five kilometres. MRP-only pricing — what's printed on the box is what you pay.

steps.title: Walk in or message us
steps.description: Stop by during opening hours or send us your prescription on WhatsApp — both work.

steps.title: Talk to a pharmacist
steps.description: Quick questions, dosage advice, alternatives — they'll walk you through it before you commit.

steps.title: Take home, or we deliver
steps.description: Pay at the counter and leave, or have it delivered to your door — usually within the hour.

compliance.disclaimer: Two Pharmacy is a licensed retail pharmacy. The content on this website is intended for general awareness and is not a substitute for professional medical diagnosis, advice, or treatment. Prescription medicines are dispensed only against a valid prescription, in accordance with applicable regulations.
